content: TASK-049 checkpoint done under TASK-010: release-facing docs and publication wiring are prepared. SYNTAX.md now has quick start, concept semantics, view/add-info behavior, viewer embedding, PNG export, and CDN/GitHub Pages examples. The npm package was renamed from occupied unscoped archmap to @archmap/core; docs/import maps/self-references/tsconfig/vite were updated. Added .github/workflows/pages.yml to build dist and deploy the viewer page to GitHub Pages. Verification: npm view archmap shows existing 1.5.0 package; npm view @archmap/core is E404/unpublished; npm access list packages @archmap shows read-write access; npm run typecheck; npm test -- --run test/render.test.ts test/scene3d.test.ts test/icons.test.ts; npm run build; npm pack --dry-run; git diff --check. Next external side effects: create or push ai-org-labs/archmap, publish @archmap/core@0.1.0 to npm, and verify GitHub Pages/CDN URLs. If npm publish asks for OTP/MFA, request it from the human. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
